summary: Multi-club feature fully tested - all 12 backend tests passed, all frontend features working correctly
passed_tests: GET /api/clubs returns JAMS Club (id: jams-club) with 258 members
PUT /api/clubs/{club_id} updates club name and description
DELETE /api/clubs/{club_id} fails with 400 when club has members
Members have club_id and club_name fields
GET /api/dashboard/stats?club_id=jams-club returns correct stats (258 active members)
GET /api/auth/me returns clubs array for admin
POST /api/transactions with club_id creates transaction with club_id
Frontend: Dashboard shows JAMS Club selector in sidebar
Frontend: Club selector dropdown shows JAMS Club with member count (258)
Frontend: Clubs page (/admin/clubs) loads and shows JAMS Club card
Frontend: Add Club modal opens and creates new club successfully
Frontend: Members page shows '258 total members in JAMS Club'
Frontend: Switching clubs updates the active club in selector
seed_data_creation: TEST_Art_Club was created during testing and cleaned up after
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-club feature fully implemented and tested. JAMS Club (id: jams-club) is the default club with 258 members. Admin has is_super_admin=true and can see all clubs. Club selector persists in localStorage (key: activeClubId). All CRUD operations for clubs work. Members, transactions, dashboard stats, and leaderboard all support club_id filtering.

club_crud.create: Working - admin can create new clubs
club_crud.update: Working - can update name and description
club_crud.delete: Working - blocked when club has members

frontend_ui.club_selector: Working - visible in sidebar with dropdown
frontend_ui.clubs_page: Working - shows club cards with member counts
frontend_ui.club_switching: Working - updates active club and localStorage
